none.name: None
none.description: No job selected. A generalist with no particular specialty.

warrior.name: Warrior
warrior.description: A trained fighter specialised in melee combat.

ranger.name: Ranger
ranger.description: A wilderness scout skilled with ranged weapons and survival.

mage.name: Mage
mage.description: A student of arcane arts, weak in melee but powerful at range.

rogue.name: Rogue
rogue.description: A nimble trickster who strikes fast and disappears into the shadows.

cleric.name: Cleric
cleric.description: A holy warrior who heals allies and smites enemies with divine power.

blacksmith.name: Blacksmith
blacksmith.description: A master of metalwork, forging weapons and armour.

alchemist.name: Alchemist
alchemist.description: A scholar of substances, brewing potions and concoctions.

merchant.name: Merchant
merchant.description: A shrewd trader who deals in goods and resources.

farmer.name: Farmer
farmer.description: A skilled cultivator of the land and keeper of animals.
